name: CloudBees CI REST API
description: CloudBees CI (formerly CloudBees Jenkins Enterprise) provides a REST API based on the Jenkins REST API. It allows management of jobs, builds, queues, and nodes. The CloudBees Operations Center (CJOC) provides additional team and controller management endpoints. Authentication uses API tokens with Basic Auth (username:apitoken).
